heading:
Building for
the web,
for real.
bio_1: I'm John Nutter, a full stack developer based in Decatur, GA. I work across the full stack — React interfaces, PHP backends, Astro-powered static sites, and the CI/CD pipelines that keep everything running.
bio_2: Most of my work sits at the intersection of developer tooling and editorial content systems. I care about maintainability: code that a team can work in six months from now, content systems that editors can actually use, and deploy pipelines that fail loudly and recover cleanly.
